---
title: "Linear Algebra and Matrix Theory for Computational Science"
subtitle: "CORE-002 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "Advanced linear algebra with emphasis on matrix decompositions, spectral theory, and computational aspects. Every model in the curriculum — from regression to finite elements to neural networks — is ultimately a problem in linear algebra."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Linear Algebra and Matrix Theory for Computational Science

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
